text: Welcome, @guide_sam! You’re approved and set up as an event_helper. Glad to have you aboard — jump into the events channel when you’re ready.
Welcome, @helper_alex! You’re approved and set up as a moderator. Glad to have you here — please check the moderator guidelines and say hi in the team channels.
Welcome, @mentor_lina! You’re approved and set up as a mentor. Great to have you with us — feel free to introduce yourself and connect with the community.
